title: Credit Control & Technical Accounts Officer
description:
Join a Dynamic, Growing Finance Team!

Are you an experienced Credit Control or Technical Accounts professional looking to take the next step in your career? We’re seeking a motivated Credit Control / Technical Accounts Officer to join our high‑performing Finance team, supporting both our Insurance and Reinsurance operations across Asia.

In this role, you’ll manage high‑volume ledgers, drive timely debt collection, perform technical accounting activities, and partner with internal and external stakeholders to ensure financial accuracy and strong receivables performance.

What You’ll Be Doing:

  • Manage daily banking and receipting across high‑volume AR ledgers

  • Perform technical accounting for treaty business, including reconciliations and allocations

  • Drive timely debt collection and follow up on overdue accounts

  • Enter statements of accounts into the system and handle queries

  • Prepare month‑end reporting including aged debtor analysis

  • Conduct credit checks for new clients

  • Build strong stakeholder relationships internally and externally

What We’re Looking For
We’re looking for someone who’s confident with numbers, great with people, and thrives in a fast‑paced environment. If you’re detail‑driven, skilled in Excel, comfortable managing deadlines, and enjoy building strong working relationships, you’ll fit right in. Experience in credit control or technical accounts will set you up for success, and knowledge of treaty reinsurance or accounting systems is a bonus.

Essential:

  • Minimum 3 years of experience in credit control or receivables.

  • Strong numerical accuracy and attention to detail.

  • Advanced Excel skills.

  • Strong analytical and problem‑solving abilities.

  • Excellent communication skills (written & verbal).

  • Ability to build relationships and collaborate with diverse stakeholders.

  • Able to prioritise competing deadlines in a fast‑paced environment.

Desirable:

  • Experience with PeopleSoft or similar accounting systems.

  • Exposure to treaty reinsurance technical accounting.

postedCompany.description:
Berkley Insurance Asia, as a member of W. R. Berkley Corporation, prospers from a lineage of strength and stability. W. R. Berkley Corporation was founded in 1967, and is a Fortune 500 Company listed on the NYSE under ticker “WRB”.


Here in Asia; We have been protecting businesses in Asia for over a decade. We have offices in Singapore and Hong Kong providing insurance and facultative reinsurance, and a representative office in Tokyo. We also have a specialty underwriting team in Shanghai under Lloyd’s China.


Asian Expertise; We have been protecting businesses in Asia for over a decade. We have offices in Singapore and Hong Kong providing insurance and facultative reinsurance, and a representative office in Tokyo. We also have a specialty underwriting team in Shanghai under Lloyd’s China.


Financial Recognition; Recognised for our financial strength, Berkley’s member companies are rated A+ (Strong) by Standard & Poor’s and A+ (Superior) by A.M. Best Company.


We have product lines in Casualty, financial lines and Marine.


Our Claims philosophy is Play Fair, Pay Early. We live by our indispensable and unwavering promise. All claims are handled by our skilled and experienced team in Asia, who you can connect with easily.
postedCompany.name: BERKLEY INSURANCE COMPANY (Singapore Branch)

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
